DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT DERRICK HUI, ARROW CHECKER CAB, INC, THURA KO'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO DEPOSITION QUESTIONS IS GRANTED. DEFENDANTS ARE ENTITLED TO A CONTINUED DEPOSITION FOR THE SOLE PURPOSE OF ASKING PLAINTIFF ABOUT HIS USE OF ALCOHOL AND DRUGS BEFORE THE ACCIDENT. PLAINTIFF'S RELEVANCE OBJECTIONS ARE PRESERVED FOR TRIAL. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM THOMAS COHEN, CLERK K. LIU, NOT REPORTED. (D302)
